bullets: Collected and organized competitor information for a retail consulting project, supporting market landscape analysis for the client team.
Analyzed sales records using Excel and SQL to identify product-level performance patterns and customer purchasing trends.
Created data visualizations in Tableau and Excel to communicate key findings for the final client report.
Participated in a client meeting and supported the preparation of analytical materials for business decision-making.
Designed a questionnaire-based study to examine factors influencing consumer purchase intention, collecting 312 valid responses for analysis.
Conducted regression analysis using SPSS to evaluate the effects of perceived usefulness and trust on consumer decision-making.
Reviewed academic literature on consumer behavior and synthesized key theoretical frameworks to support the research design.
Prepared the data analysis section of the final report, identifying statistically significant factors relevant to business analytics applications.
